title: hieracium levicaule subsp. sbaense
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. sbaense, commonly known as Sbaense Hawkweed, is a rare subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family native to the Iberian Peninsula. As a member of the Hieracium genus, Sbaense Hawkweed has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Sbaense Hawkweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
